1493.name: Narrow Staircase
1493.description: A narrow wooden staircase leads upward.

1494.name: Peephole Room
1494.description: This room has peepholes set at various heights so that a person can comfortably peer into the next room without being observed. It is tastefully decorated with small, cushioned benches and expensive tapestries.

npcs.name: Hermaphrodite
npcs.description: Nature has given this human creature the physical aspects of both man and

1497.name: Hallway
1497.description: Heavy, dank stones make up the walls of this rectangular subterranean passage. Your heart is filled with a curious dread as you wonder what is behind the heavy steel door and beyond the northern portal.

1498.name: West End of the Hall
1498.description: This hallway looks like the other part of the hallway that you were in except that there is a steel door to the north and an iron-barred door to the south.

1499.name: The Middle of the Hall
1499.description: You see a door made of iron bars to the south. The hallway continues.

e.to_room_name: The East End of the Hall

1500.name: The East End of the Hall
1500.description: You find yourself, yet again, in a hallway. But this time there is a door to the east and a cell door to the south.

1501.name: Dark Cell
1501.description: This cell has a straw tick artfully strewn in the corner.

1502.name: Comfy Cell
1502.description: Droplets of candle wax coat the stone floor.

n.to_room_name: The East End of the Hall

1504.name: Bottom of the Stairs
1504.description: You have come to the bottom landing of a set of wide stone stairs.

284.name: The Grand Gateway
284.description: You stand before an enormous iron gate with gilded spikes running along its high, arched top. The gate is flanked by two granite monoliths whose presence speaks of great wealth, but also of great power. The monoliths rest against a high, smooth stone wall that extends around the building. You see a marble gatehouse to the west, which is half-covered in intricate vines with large, heart shaped leaves. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

npcs.name: Dapper gateguard
npcs.description: two inch frame is stratified with layers of scars, but his uniform of

2461.name: East Corner of House
2461.description: A beautiful gate stands gracefully to the west, while a tall hedge hides most of the view of the animal pens which are to the north. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

npcs.name: Dapper gateguard
npcs.description: two inch frame is stratified with layers of scars, but his uniform of

2462.name: Animal Pens
2462.description: For the inhabitants of this place, this is the last stop before the table. The refuse of this smelly place is neatly raked into noisome piles. A gate allows access through the wall to the west, and a towering cliff blocks your path to the north. A passage through the hedge leads to the south. You feel a sudden sense of foreboding and swiftly avoid a mean rooster's incoming attack! (6) Trembling, you thrust fiendishly at a mean rooster. (9)

npcs.name: Cute pink pig
npcs.description: This pig's skin gleams under its coarse hair.  It has a curious expression on its face, as if it were smiling.

285.name: West Corner of House
285.description: The high, smooth wall gracefully curves from east to north. You see a stable attached to the wall north of here and you see that the huge front gate lies to the east.

1316.name: Gatehouse
1316.description: This room is built to protect the guards from the elements. It does so with a smooth alabaster facade, and a wide marble mantle.

2598.name: Tunnel Entrance
2598.description: A narrow arch frames the dark entrance to this tunnel.

2599.name: A Jog in the Tunnel
2599.description: The tunnel switches back on itself.

2600.name: A Bend in the Tunnel
2600.description: The dripping walls turn sharply here.

1478.name: Center of Porch
1478.description: Huge grooved columns, topped with ornate caps, rise to at least three times your height on this platform. The porch extends to the east and west, the front door is to the north, and the main gate is to the south.

1479.name: Entrance Room
1479.description: Gleaming onyx trim accents the lustrous marble that covers every surface in this large room. To the west are coat racks with enough space to hold all the coats of the concubines of the legendary King Hogan. Large double doors lead into the house to the north, and doors lead south to the porch.

npcs.name: Beautiful, tiny doormaid
npcs.description: natural charm.  She wears a black, ankle-length skirt and a white blouse that is trimmed with lace.

1480.name: Center of Ballroom
1480.description: Lavish, garish, and gorgeous are all words that spring to mind when you see the highly polished, inlaid marble of the floor. Two columns support the vaulted ceiling in this part of the room. Stuffed divans and highly polished sideboards adorn this cavern of opulence. The room itself extends to the east and west, while huge double doors lead north. The front doors are to the south, and a spiral staircase winds gracefully upward.

1481.name: West End of Ballroom
1481.description: Gild and filigree assault your senses. Fine marble coats the walls and floor and makes up the slender columns that support the high, arching roof of this long room which continues to the east. A wide and ornately carved door also leads to the north.

1482.name: Auditorium
1482.description: Low couches and overstuffed chairs are arranged in a semicircle around a low stage in the northern corner of the room. The stage has room for several musicians and their instruments. You see a door to the east and a much more elaborately carved door leading south.

1483.name: Western Hallway
1483.description: The carpet muffles your steps as you are forced to choose where to put them next. You can go north or south, or you can try the door to the west.

1484.name: Western Hallway
1484.description: This could turn out to be the longest carpet that you have ever seen. The hall continues north and south, a door leads west and a portal leads east to a courtyard garden.

1485.name: Purple Sitting Room
1485.description: A small vanity attends the vain. This might be a good time to check your coiffure. Aside from the vanity there are several chairs, a small couch, and an ottoman. They are all upholstered in crushed purple velvet. A small, dainty writing table primps against the west wall. There is a door to the east and a room to the west.

1487.name: Northwest Corner of Hallway
1487.description: The carpet makes a sharp, ninety degree turn and continues. The hallway carries it away to the south and east, and there are doors to the west and to the north.

1488.name: Green Sitting Room
1488.description: The color of the furniture in this room is the color of the sea on a calm, misty morning. If you weren't such a busy person you might find this the perfect place to settle in with some good food and some good friends for a few good hours. But, alas, an adventurer's lot is not a sedentary one. A door leads to the east and to the west is a bedroom.

1489.name: Green Guest Bedroom
1489.description: You're reminded of a deep forest meadow by the color of the trappings in this bedroom. An enormous bed fills the room. The mattress is so thick that you would have to pull yourself up onto it if you wanted to lie down. A wardrobe stands rigidly along the west wall. The only obvious exit from this room is the doorway to the east.

npcs.name: Ina Goodwife
npcs.description: your chest while it's still beating.

1490.name: Antechamber
1490.description: This small room ordinarily contains no furniture because there are three doors opening into it. The doors to the north and south gently ruffle the silk arras on the west wall but the door to the east slides into the wall without disturbing the air.

1491.name: Master Bedroom
1491.description: You have lived in rooms that were smaller than the bed here. A paisley the size of a small dragon adorns the down-filled comforter that lies across the top of the mattress. A fireplace that you could walk into dominates the west wall and is faced by a large overstuffed chair. A built-in bar holds racks of colored liquids against the north wall. Doors lead southwest, southeast, and east.

npcs.name: Cium Nustrum
npcs.description: he is the type who misplaces his spectacles.

1492.name: Top of Private Staircase
1492.description: Handrails provide some safety on this steep, narrow staircase.

1505.name: On the Stairs
1505.description: You are standing on a set of wide stone stairs.

1513.name: Service Hall
1513.description: This is a narrow hallway for servants' access. Exits are to the north and south, the passage lets out onto the main hallway to the west, and a narrow stairway leads down.

1514.name: Utility Room
1514.description: This room has a square work table and two chairs. Scraps of material and bits of leather are arranged in piles along one wall.

1515.name: Northeast Corner of Upstairs Hallway
1515.description: To the east is a narrow, short hallway. To the north is a doorway. To the south and west the passage continues.

1516.name: Maids Quarters
1516.description: Two single beds wait patiently for their owners to return to them. This room is clean and tidy, although it is none too cheery.

1517.name: Northern Upstairs Hallway
1517.description: The hallway continues east and west. A doorway leads to the north.

1518.name: Attendants Quarters
1518.description: Three small beds sit in this room, but only one of them looks as though it has been recently used.

1519.name: Northern Upstairs Hallway
1519.description: The hallway continues east and west. A doorway leads to the north and a doorway leads to the south. A wardrobe grazes you with its attack. (15) With an angry cry, you thrust your dagger into a wardrobe. (33) Your fury ignites as you strike again with relentless force! Well aimed! You hurl yourself forward and stab a wardrobe BRUTALLY with your dagger. (51) The ocean's energy begins to flow through you, granting you the speed of a gentle current.

1520.name: Doormaids Room
1520.description: This room is provided with a small bed and a tiny vanity.

1521.name: Northwest Corner of Upstairs Hallway
1521.description: Doors lead north and west, and the hallway continues to the south and east. Theshpar's back arches in agony as a result of your GRUESOME backstab! (81) Theshpar howls in pain and falls down, paralyzed! Theshpar issues a bloodcurdling cry of pain! You get a dagger from the corpse of Theshpar. You get 127 obsidian coins from a corpse here. You get a habergeon from the corpse of Theshpar.

npcs.name: Theshpar
npcs.description: your intimates while you are in them.

1523.name: Western Upstairs Hallway
1523.description: It leads north and south. A door leads west. No one here by that name.

1524.name: Drawing Room
1524.description: This is a small lounge where guests can visit each other. Two brown couches face each other next to a small fireplace while an overstuffed chair has been pushed back into one corner next to a small end table.

1525.name: Western Upstairs Hallway
1525.description: Waxed oak floors provide solid footing on your journey through the upstairs part of the house. There is a doorway to the east and a door to the west.

1526.name: The Apartment of Cyclax
1526.description: Heavy incense assaults your nostrils as you enter this room. Small wind chimes and bells made of various metals fill the air with faint tinkling sounds. The bed clothes are the color of bright, fresh blood. There are strange markings on the floor.

npcs.name: Cyclax
npcs.description: and face have been turned to leather by icy northern winds.

1527.name: Southwest Corner of Upstairs Hallway
1527.description: It's a hallway. What do you want? There are doors to the south and west, and the passage continues to the north and east.

1528.name: Dahngholds Apartment
1528.description: The bed is tightly tucked, the objects on the night table are arranged at right angles, and the uniform on the valet is crisply pressed. Without a doubt, this is the room of a military man.

npcs.name: Dahnghold
npcs.description: him several teeth and a crushed cheekbone.

1529.name: The Apartment of Mercruses
1529.description: Everything in this apartment is definitely wrong. The floor refuses to appear level, especially where unfocused sigils dance in geometric irregularity. The room also smells variously of tomcats, jellybeans, and chalk dust. You think that there is a bed in here somewhere.

1506.name: Top of the Stairs
1506.description: You stand on a wide stone landing. Stairs continue straight down into darkness.

1507.name: Eastern Hallway
1507.description: The carpet quiets your feet. You may go north or south, or you can try the heavy wooden door to the west.

1508.name: Eastern Hallway
1508.description: That's it! This hallway is really working your nerves. So far you haven't found a seam in the carpet, which is pretty weird because if it's one piece the guy either had it made in the hall, or he built the house around it, because it wraps all the way around the courtyard hallway. The courtyard is to the west, the dining room is to the east, and the stupid hall continues to the south and to the north.

1509.name: Northeastern Corner of Hallway
1509.description: Another day, another elbow. In this case, an elbow of carpet. The tiny flower pattern in the runner makes your head swim. You wonder how they keep it so clean as you notice a doorway to the east. The hallway, no matter how much you don't want it to, continues to the south and to the west.

1510.name: The Kitchen
1510.description: You haven't seen a kitchen this big since you deserted the army. This one, however, does not smell of beans and potatoes. It smells of lightly battered chicken and sauteed mushrooms. Your mouth starts to water as you search the spotless counters. There are three doorways to this room, leading north, south, and west, and a narrow staircase leads upward.

1511.name: Pantry
1511.description: This is the place where all the dry goods get placed before they are eaten. The walls are lined with shelves so close together that you can barely turn around.

1512.name: At the Servants Entrance
1512.description: The earth here is pounded hard by busy feet carrying heavy things. The door leading into the house is to the west, a low, wide, iron gate leads to the east, and there is a well-used work area to the south.
